Welcome, Baller
Set up once — the app remembers you every visit.
Privacy Notice
By signing up, you agree that your name, email, and workout activity will be stored securely and used solely to power this team app. Your data is never sold or shared outside of this team. Coaches and parents may view your progress. You can request removal at any time by contacting your coach.
🔒 Privacy
We collect: Name, email, workout reps
Stored in: Supabase (secure cloud)
Used for: Leaderboards & rewards only
Shared with: Your coach & team only
Parents: email [email protected] to request data deletion.
Parent View 👀
Enter your player's email to follow their progress. View-only — no logging or editing.
Privacy Notice
Your name and your player's email are used only to give you view-only access to their progress. No data is sold or shared outside this team. Your information is stored securely and only visible to coaches and team admins. Contact your coach to request removal at any time.
🔒 Privacy
We collect: Your name & player's email
Stored in: Supabase (secure cloud)
Used for: Viewing your player's progress only
Shared with: Your coach & team only
Email [email protected] to request data deletion.
Coach Access
Enter your name and PIN to unlock full oversight.
